main.description: Membership of a user in a forum board. Uses a deterministic rkey derived from the board URI (client convention: hashRkey('member', boardUri)) so membership is one-record-per-user-per-board and re-joining is idempotent.

board.description: The board the member has joined.

role.description: Self-asserted role hint. Note: on atproto this is advisory — authoritative moderation authority should be cross-checked via roleGrant records or the board owner.
